name: learned-planner-drc33
license_evidence: HF API cardData.license=apache-2.0; README.md frontmatter 'license: apache-2.0'; tag 'apache-2.0'. No standalone LICENSE file in repo, but explicit license field is definitive. Paper: Garriga-Alonso et al., ICML 2024 MechInterp Workshop.
raw_note: On-disk checkpoint is 20.6MB but that includes Adam opt_state (~15MB) + critic value head. fp32 POLICY weights (network_params + actor head) = 5.14MB.
quant: int8 (per-tensor symmetric) primary; int4 (group=64) alt. Policy params only — opt_state + critic dropped.
roundtrip_note: All 23 policy tensors reload from disk with correct shapes; int8 worst abs err 0.0118. int8 recommended for ship (action argmax sensitivity).
runtime: JAX/flax via github.com/AlignmentResearch/learned-planner (cleanba.convlstm ConvLSTM). Bundle ships quant weights + net cfg.json. Source repo is also Apache-2.0/MIT-class permissive.
notes: 'A cassette that plans' — a recurrent ConvLSTM that solves Sokoban by internal iterative planning (steps_to_think). Checkpoint is a flax msgpack file (no flax/jax installed; parsed via msgpack directly). int8 on-tape 0.79MB beats the ~1.3MB estimate.
